title: Try Meatless Monday
description: Skip meat one day per week

title: Cut red meat in half
description: Replace half your red meat meals with chicken or fish

title: Go fully vegetarian
description: Eliminate meat from your diet

title: Cut food waste by half
description: Plan meals and use leftovers to waste less food

title: Go fully vegan
description: Eliminate all animal products from your diet

title: Bike to work 2 days a week
description: Replace car commute with cycling twice per week

title: Take public transit
description: Switch your primary commute to public transit

title: Carpool to work
description: Share rides with coworkers 3+ days per week

title: Work from home 2 days a week
description: Eliminate your commute two days per week

title: Switch to an electric vehicle
description: Replace your gas car with an EV for daily driving

title: Switch to LED bulbs
description: Replace all light bulbs with energy-efficient LEDs

title: Adjust your thermostat 2 degrees
description: Lower in winter, raise in summer by 2 degrees

title: Switch to green energy plan
description: Choose a renewable energy provider for your electricity

title: Use smart power strips
description: Eliminate phantom energy draw from electronics

title: Weatherize your home
description: Seal drafts and add insulation to reduce heating and cooling

title: Buy 30% less new stuff
description: Pause before purchases and ask if you really need it

title: Try secondhand first
description: Check thrift stores and online resale before buying new

title: Repair instead of replace
description: Fix broken items instead of buying replacements

title: Choose sustainable brands
description: Support companies with verified sustainability practices

title: Skip one round-trip flight
description: Replace one flight per year with a closer destination or virtual trip

title: Take the train instead
description: Choose train travel for trips under 500 miles

title: Offset your flights
description: Purchase verified carbon offsets for your air travel

title: Book direct flights only
description: Avoid layovers — takeoff and landing use the most fuel

title: Try a staycation
description: Explore your own region instead of flying somewhere
